testing_infrastructure.highlight: Hive UI redesigned with grid view for easier test result navigation
Lean spec test vectors integration into Hive in progress
Observatory site running stable for weeks with devnet visualizations
LeanBench benchmark harness automated across GCP instance types

performance_benchmarks.highlight: Lean signature performance flat across modern 4+ core CPUs
Aggregation scales linearly to 16 cores; 32+ cores show diminishing returns
XMSS signing optimization dropped time from 200ms to 5ms
1,000 validators achievable in current slot timing; 10,000 possible with adjustments

client_progress.highlight: Zeem optimizing aggregator performance and payload re-aggregation API
Goldfish incompatible with 3SF; finality gadget research needed
LeanStart tool enables single-command Kubernetes devnet deployment
ETH Lambda added LibP2P Identify Protocol support for Zeem interop

devnet_5_scope.highlight: Devnet 5 goal: single recursive proof per block via Type 1/2 aggregation
PQ testing prioritized over consensus mechanism changes
Type 1/2 signature APIs mostly finalized; helper function needed from LeanVM
PQ roadmap acceleration possible; real-world testing urgent priority

action_items.action: Raise spec PR for recursive proof aggregation with Type 1/2 signatures
Schedule Goldfish breakout call for finality gadget discussion

decisions.decision: Devnet 5 ships PQ recursive aggregation first; Goldfish consensus optional
Freeze spec changes after Goldfish integration to focus on stability testing

targets.target: End of next week - Goldfish finality gadget breakout session
